name: mcp-opennutrition

scripts.build: rm -rf build && tsc && npm run convert-data && chmod 755 build/index.js
scripts.inspector: tsc && npm run convert-data && npx @modelcontextprotocol/inspector npx tsx src/index.ts
scripts.convert-data: tsx scripts/decompress-dataset.ts && tsx scripts/tsv-to-sqlite.ts && rm -rf data_local_temp

description: MCP implementation for OpenNutrition dataset access. Provides  listing, querying, and filtering foods.
